message:
refactor(widgets): use ftui-text width functions instead of unicode_width

Replace direct unicode_width crate usage with ftui-text's display_width
and grapheme_width functions across all widget implementations. This
consolidates width calculation logic and ensures consistent behavior
with the text crate's handling of grapheme clusters.

Files updated:
- lib.rs: Import grapheme_width, use in draw_text_span/draw_text_span_scrolled
- badge.rs: Use display_width instead of manual grapheme iteration
- block.rs, error_boundary.rs, input.rs, list.rs, modal/dialog.rs,
  paginator.rs, panel.rs, paragraph.rs, progress.rs, rule.rs,
  scrollbar.rs, spinner.rs, status_line.rs, toast.rs, validation_error.rs

Benefits:
- Single source of truth for width calculations
- Reduced direct dependency on unicode_width in widget code
- Consistent handling of complex graphemes (emoji, ZWJ sequences)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
